title: Judith
text: Judith - Literal Public Domain Translation (older English base)

title: Judith
text:
Chapter 1
In the twelfth year of the reign of Nabuchodonosor, who reigned in Nineve, in the days of Arphaxad, who reigned over the Medes in Ecbatane, and built in Ecbatane walls round about of hewn stones...
